build.beforeBuildCommand: node scripts/gen-waiting-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-external-deps.mjs && node scripts/deploy-plugins.mjs && node scripts/copy-waiting.mjs && pnpm run build && node scripts/prepare-bundled-dlc.mjs

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost blob: https: http:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' plugin: 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' plugin: https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' asset: https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob: plugin: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' asset: blob: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob: asset:; frame-src 'self'

fileAssociations.name: image
fileAssociations.description: 用安得云荟·莲花打开图片

fileAssociations.name: video
fileAssociations.description: 用安得云荟·玉兰打开视频

fileAssociations.name: audio
fileAssociations.description: 用安得云荟·铃兰打开音频
